nodes.label: Agenda Screen — Conflict Cards with Coach Mentex
nodes.description: Agenda screen dated HOY, DOM 3 MAY. Header shows '14 eventos · 3 pendientes' badge. Coach Mentex section with AI-generated conflict detection cards and focus window suggestion.

nodes.label: ProposalCard — Conflict 19:20 (Deep Focus vs Llamar a mamá)
nodes.description: Conflict card at 19:20 with amber/yellow warning triangle icon. Text: '"Sesión de enfoque profundo" coincide con "Llamar a mamá" (19:00). ¿Movemos uno de los dos?' Actions: 'Resolver' (green filled button) and 'Mantener' (outline button).

nodes.label: ProposalCard — Conflict 19:00 (Meditación Matutina vs Llamar a mamá)
nodes.description: Second conflict card at 19:00 with amber/yellow warning triangle icon. Text: '"Meditación matutina" coincide con "Llamar a mamá" (19:00). ¿Movemos uno de los dos?' Actions: 'Resolver' (green filled) and 'Mantener' (outline).

nodes.label: ProposalCard — Ventana de Enfoque 16:00
nodes.description: Focus window suggestion card at 16:00 with target/bullseye icon. Text: '90 min libres entre el review y el gym. Tu mejor ventana para trabajo profundo. ¿Arranco una sesión y bloqueo apps?' Actions: 'Reservar bloque' (green filled) and 'Ahora no' (outline).

nodes.label: ProposalCard — Cierre Reflexivo 21:30
nodes.description: End-of-day reflection card at 21:30 with crescent moon icon. Text: '5 minutos para reflexionar sobre tu jornada antes de desconectarte. ¿Lo agendo?' Actions: 'Activar' (green filled) and 'Saltar hoy' (outline).

nodes.label: Agenda Timeline — Google Calendar Sync + Day View
nodes.description: Timeline section labeled 'TIMELINE DEL DÍA' showing '7 MENTEX · 7 CALENDAR'. Google Calendar connected and synced ('Google Calendar · sincronizado' with green dot and 'Desconectar' action). Shows 9:00 am Daily standup entry.

nodes.label: Coach Mentex — AI Proposal Section Header
nodes.description: Section header 'COACH MENTEX' with sparkle/AI icon. Groups all AI-generated ProposalCards (conflict detection, focus window, cierre reflexivo). Acts as a contextual AI recommendations feed within Agenda.

nodes.label: Amber Warning Styling — Conflict Card Visual Language
nodes.description: Conflict cards use amber/yellow warning triangle (⚠) icon against dark card background. Distinguishes scheduling conflicts from positive suggestions (which use teal/green icons). Amber color token signals urgency without red alarm severity.

nodes.label: ProposalCard Component — AI Suggestion Card Pattern
nodes.description: Reusable ProposalCard component pattern: icon + timestamp in header, descriptive body text, 2-button action row (primary green filled + secondary outline). Used for conflicts (amber icon), focus windows (target icon), and rituals (moon icon).

nodes.label: Conflict Detection Feature — Schedule Overlap AI Analysis
nodes.description: Coach Mentex AI feature that detects overlapping calendar events and presents resolution options. Shown resolving: 'Sesión de enfoque profundo' vs 'Llamar a mamá' at 19:00-19:20. Binary choice: Resolver (reschedule) or Mantener (keep conflict).
